title: Updated guidance for the Public Transport Ticketing Schemes Block Exemption Summary
body: "The block exemption automatically exempts certain types of transport ticketing schemes from Chapter I of the Competition Act 1998.    The updated guidance is intended to replace the CMA’s Guidance on the public transport ticketing schemes block exemption (CMA53) published in 2016.   For more details and how to respond go to our dedicated consultation page.  "
